subject: [GENERAL] Use readiness container v3.0.1
commit_message:
[GENERAL] Use readiness container v3.0.1

Readiness container v3.x and up are now present in ONAP main repository.
They're also not using root user anymore and then script path has
changed.
Finally, "job_complete" script has been integrated in main "ready"
script.
As those changes are significant, we must upgrade all the components at
once.

Depends-On: I5afa83892043f4844afe12e61724a8d368a9f2e0
Issue-ID: OOM-2545
Signed-off-by: Grzegorz Lis <grzegorz.lis@nokia.com>
Change-Id: I0b4eb5dd86390273532d67d0a9696e1cfcadf110

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

(2 comments)

Hi, I've tried to use this commit - unfortunately it fails with errors added below.
Tried to change those templates by adding "." in:
  image: "{{ $dotinclude "common.repository" . }}/{{ $dot.Values.global.readinessImage }}"  
to make it look like this:
  image: "{{ $dot.include "common.repository" . }}/{{ $dot.Values.global.readinessImage }}"

But this causes another error.
The same when I try to change it by removing "$dot" to:
  image: "{{ include "common.repository" . }}/{{ $dot.Values.global.readinessImage }}" 

But again - another error occurs later in component.
Uploaded patch set 2.
